title: BBCA & BMRI Customer Retention Campaign Poster
content: Create a professional promotional banking poster for 'BBCA & BMRI' — Retention campaign. A visually striking promotional poster for a banking customer retention campaign. The scene features diverse, happy customers interacting seamlessly with modern digital banking interfaces on tablets and smartphones, with subtle background elements of iconic Indonesian landmarks. The style is modern, clean, and premium, with a warm and inviting color palette of blues, greens, and gold accents. Typography should be elegant and trustworthy. The mood is secure, progressive, and customer-centric. Emphasize financial well-being and long-term partnership. Style: modern financial brand aesthetic, premium feel, trust-inspiring colour palette (deep blue, gold accents), clean typography. Include subtle banking motifs (upward charts, shield icon, handshake). Suitable for digital channels: website, email header, social media banner. Output image resolution: 1024x1024 pixels (1K), square format, high detail.

title: BBCA & BMRI – Google Ad Copy
content:
Here are 3 Google Ad copy variants, optimised for your brand, product, audience, and urgent tone:

---

**Variant 1: Focus on Immediate Savings**

*   **Headline:** Upgrade & Save Annually
*   **Description:** Don't miss out! Switch from month-to-month to 'Hemat' annual & lock in big savings now.
*   **Primary Text/Hook:** Your month-to-month plan is costing you more. Act fast to secure exclusive annual savings with BBCA & BMRI.
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now

---

**Variant 2: Focus on Stability & Avoiding Risk**

*   **Headline:** Secure Your Service Now
*   **Description:** End month-to-month uncertainty. Upgrade to 'Setia' annual for guaranteed stability & peace of mind.
*   **Primary Text/Hook:** Future-proof your service with BBCA & BMRI. Don't risk interruptions or price hikes – commit annually today!
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now

---

**Variant 3: Direct Call to Action & Combined Benefits**

*   **Headline:** Act Fast: Annual Upgrade
*   **Description:** Month-to-month users: Unlock 'Setia' stability & 'Hemat' savings. Limited-time offer!
*   **Primary Text/Hook:** Don't delay your upgrade! Maximize value with BBCA & BMRI's annual contract – combining savings and security.
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now

---

title: BBCA & BMRI – Meta Ad Copy
content:
Here are 3 Meta ad copy variants, optimised for urgency and targeting month-to-month contract holders at risk of churn for BBCA & BMRI's Annual Contract Upgrade - Setia & Hemat.

---

**Variant 1: Direct Urgency & Savings Focus**

*   **Headline:** Stop Overpaying NOW!
*   **Description:** Your month-to-month plan is costing you. Upgrade to annual & save big!
*   **Primary Text/Hook:**
    Still paying month-to-month with BBCA & BMRI? 🚨 You're missing out on massive savings and exclusive loyalty perks! Don't let another month go by overpaying.

    Our Annual Contract Upgrade - Setia & Hemat - is designed for YOU. Lock in lower rates, enjoy premium benefits, and secure your service without the constant worry of renewal.

    This isn't just an upgrade; it's a smart financial move. The clock is ticking on these special rates. Act fast before you lose out on guaranteed savings!
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now

---

**Variant 2: Exclusivity & Stability Urgency**

*   **Headline:** Secure Your Savings Today!
*   **Description:** Limited-time offer for month-to-month users. Get Setia & Hemat benefits!
*   **Primary Text/Hook:**
    Month-to-month with BBCA & BMRI? Your exclusive chance to upgrade is HERE! ⏳ Why settle for less when you can get MORE for less?

    The Annual Contract Upgrade - Setia & Hemat - offers unparalleled savings and loyalty rewards you won't find anywhere else. Imagine a year of stable service, locked-in low prices, and premium support.

    This special offer won't last forever. Don't risk losing these benefits. Make the switch now and experience the true value of being a loyal customer!
*   **CTA:** Learn More

---

**Variant 3: Pain Point & Immediate Solution Urgency**

*   **Headline:** Don't Miss Out! Act Fast!
*   **Description:** Ditch month-to-month stress. Upgrade to annual for huge savings & perks!
*   **Primary Text/Hook:**
    Tired of the month-to-month grind with BBCA & BMRI? 💸 Stop the cycle of higher costs and uncertainty! Your opportunity for a smarter, cheaper plan is NOW.

    Introducing the Annual Contract Upgrade - Setia & Hemat. This isn't just about saving money; it's about gaining peace of mind, enjoying exclusive loyalty benefits, and securing your service for a full year at an unbeatable rate.

    This offer is strictly for our valued month-to-month customers, but it's expiring soon! Don't delay – seize this chance to upgrade and start saving immediately.
*   **CTA:** Get My Offer

title: BBCA & BMRI – LinkedIn Ad Copy
content:
Here are 3 ad copy variants optimised for LinkedIn, with an urgent tone, targeting month-to-month contract holders at risk of churn for BBCA & BMRI's Annual Contract Upgrade - Setia & Hemat.

---

**Variant 1**

*   **Headline:** Act Fast: Upgrade Now!
*   **Description:** Don't lose out on exclusive savings. Secure your annual contract today!
*   **Primary Text:**
    Still on month-to-month? You're missing out! Your current contract leaves you vulnerable to price changes and misses significant savings. BBCA & BMRI are offering an urgent upgrade path to our Annual Setia & Hemat plans. Lock in lower rates, enjoy premium benefits, and gain peace of mind. This exclusive offer for existing clients won't last. Don't wait until it's too late to secure your best deal!
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now

---

**Variant 2**

*   **Headline:** Secure Your Future Now
*   **Description:** Stop paying more! Switch to annual & lock in your best rates with Setia/Hemat.
*   **Primary Text:**
    Is your month-to-month contract holding you back? The uncertainty of short-term agreements can lead to unexpected costs and a lack of stability. BBCA & BMRI invite you to urgently upgrade to an Annual Setia or Hemat plan. Gain the stability you deserve, enjoy significant cost savings, and ensure uninterrupted service. This limited-time opportunity is designed for valued clients like you. Don't risk losing your current benefits or facing future price hikes. Act immediately!
*   **CTA:** Get Offer

---

**Variant 3**

*   **Headline:** Don't Miss Out: Save!
*   **Description:** Your exclusive annual upgrade offer expires soon. Lock in savings & stability!
*   **Primary Text:**
    Urgent: Your month-to-month contract is costing you! Why pay more when you can secure massive savings and unwavering stability? BBCA & BMRI are giving you a final chance to upgrade to our Annual Setia & Hemat plans. Choose Hemat for maximum savings or Setia for ultimate loyalty benefits. Both offer peace of mind you won't get month-to-month. This is a time-sensitive offer for our valued clients. The window to secure these exclusive annual rates is closing fast. Don't delay – upgrade today before it's gone!
*   **CTA:** Upgrade Now
